subcodes.first_line: O thou who wanderest in His path! The Most Great Name and the Ancient Beauty hath shed His effulgence upon the horizons of all peoples, and from this dawning light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوی او اسم اعظم و جمال قدم تجلی بر آفاق امم فرمود و از این اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
